'''Arkam 13''' was a [[wheelworld]]<ref name="DS" /> in the [[Arkam system/Legends|Arkam system]]<ref name="TEA" /> that was home to the archive known as the [[Holorepository]].<ref name="DS" />

{{Station-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Although the Inner Rim map of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Arkam system in the galactic grid M-14, the star system appendixes of both the ''Atlas'' and its [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] placed the Arkam system in N-13.<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="EAOC" /> [[Jason Fry]], author of ''The Essential Atlas'' and its Online Companion, later moved the Arkam system from N-13 to M-14 in the system appendix of the [[2025]] [[Canon]] [[Star Systems of the Galaxy]].<ref name="Appendix">{{GalaxyMapAppendix}}</ref> This article assumes the latter placement is correct.
